author: Helen M.
title: Exceptional from start to finish
body: Sarah went above and beyond. Her valuation was spot on and she had viewers through within the first week. Sold for over asking price in just 24 days.

author: James K.
title: Honest and professional
body: Unlike other agents who inflated their valuations to win our business, Sarah gave us an honest figure. She was right - we sold at exactly the price she suggested.

author: Patricia W.
title: Great result, communication could improve
body: Achieved a fantastic sale price but there were a couple of weeks where we didn't hear much. Overall very happy with the outcome though.

author: Sophie L.
title: The virtual tour made all the difference
body: James's team created an incredible virtual tour that attracted buyers from all over the country. We had 12 viewings in the first weekend. Sold within 2 weeks.

author: Mark R.
title: Efficient and knowledgeable
body: James clearly knows the Manchester market inside out. His pricing advice was backed by solid data. Would use again.

author: Robert H.
title: Nobody knows the Cotswolds better
body: Emma understood exactly what made our cottage special and marketed it beautifully. Found a buyer who fell in love with it, just like we did 20 years ago.

author: Rebecca F.
title: Modern approach, amazing photos
body: Olivia's photographer made our home look like something from a magazine. The social media campaign she ran brought in buyers we'd never have found through Rightmove alone.

author: Fiona M.
title: Edinburgh expert through and through
body: Richard navigated the Scottish system brilliantly. His experience with closing dates and offers over was invaluable. Achieved well above the home report valuation.

author: Andrew P.
title: Honest agent - rare find
body: Michael actually told us our home was worth less than what another agent quoted. We trusted his honesty and he was right - we sold quickly at his price. No wasted time.

author: Nina B.
title: Great for investment properties
body: David helped us sell two buy-to-let properties. His knowledge of investor buyers meant both sold quickly to cash buyers. Very smooth process.
